Dr. Robert Anderson

Assistant Professor of Mechanical Engineering

Specializing in Computational Fluid Dynamics, Sustainable Energy Systems, and Advanced Thermodynamics. Dedicated to solving complex engineering challenges through innovative research and education.


View Research Get in Touch

Research Highlights

Fluid Dynamics

Investigating turbulent flow patterns in high-velocity systems using advanced computational models.

Learn more →

Sustainable Energy

Developing novel heat exchanger designs to improve efficiency in renewable energy applications.

Learn more →

Micro-Robotics

Designing bio-inspired soft robots for navigation in complex environments.

Learn more →
